spacing_and_layout.container_style: Grid Borders (Technical Look) - Use border-collapse style layout. Expose the skeleton. Containers should have flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders (border-border), and no drop shadows. Use border-r and border-b for separating inner data points instead of individual cards.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Slight background lightness change (hover:bg-zinc-800/50 hover:text-white). explicitly set text color on hover.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle pulse for live data indicators (animate-pulse on the green/red status pills). Minimalist animations elsewhere.

components.navigation: Dense top header with right-aligned status indicators (Upstox Connection, Paper Mode toggle). Left sidebar or secondary top nav for views (Dashboard, Backtest, Settings).
components.cards_and_panels: Go cardless. Flat backgrounds, rectangular, dense styles. 1px subtle border, no shadow.
components.tables: Tabular/monospaced fonts for all numbers. Dense padding (py-1.5 px-3). Sortable headers. Right-aligned number columns.
components.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast. Primary actions in white bg / black text. Destructive in muted red outline.
components.charts: Recharts with dark mode tooltips. Minimal grid lines (border-border/30). No 3D charts. Line and area charts only.
components.status_pills: Tiny (text-[10px]), uppercase, tracking-wider, font-mono. Regime indicator: Bull (Green), Bear (Red), Sideways (Amber).

icons.style: Regular or Duotone weight. 16px to 20px sizes for dense dashboard fit.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Apply JetBrains Mono (font-mono) to ALL data values, prices, P&L, and quantities. This is critical for the quant desk aesthetic.
Ensure 'Paper Trade Simulator' banner is highly visible when active (e.g., striped background or prominent top border).
The Upstox Connection Status should use a status dot (green=connected, red=expired, yellow=refreshing).
Ensure P&L values have clear + or - signs, and corresponding colors text-emerald-500 or text-red-500. Avoid neon glow.

Strictly follow the 'Control Room' grid system (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6) for maximum density. Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout with 'Grid Borders' style (dividing lines between metrics), Shadcn components for complex interactions like dialogs or select menus.
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions (dropdown, calendar, toast).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
